name: Kingwaytek Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Kingwaytek Technology Co., Ltd. produces electronic maps and develops GIS systems in Taiwan. It offers telecommunications maps, 3D maps, and high-definition maps for self-driving cars; and Leke navigation wang quan 3D, a mobile navigation software that provides 3D map, traffic lights along the way, road markings, signs, surrounding landmarks, viaducts, and navigation guidelines under the bridge. The company also provides Leke navigation king TM series that offers professional car networking navigation software for vehicle use; and Leker interchange, a transfer and pedestrian route guidance service. In addition, it offers big data services that are used in smart traffic diversion and enhancing public transport services; Leke store; and LE bus owner service. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
